long_to_bytes)
EccKeyc
Invalid ECDH point)
pointQ
is_point_at_infinity
ValueErrorr
size_in_bytes)
key_privZ
key_pubZ
pointP
</usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/Cryptodome/Protocol/DH.py
_compute_ecdh
r~|	|
Perform a Diffie-Hellman key agreement.
    Keywords:
      kdf (callable):
        A key derivation function that accepts ``bytes`` as input and returns
        ``bytes``.
      static_priv (EccKey):
        The local static private key. Optional.
      static_pub (EccKey):
        The static public key that belongs to the peer. Optional.
      eph_priv (EccKey):
        The local ephemeral private key, generated for this session. Optional.
      eph_pub (EccKey):
        The ephemeral public key, received from the peer for this session. Optional.
    At least two keys must be passed, of which one is a private key and one
    a public key.
    Returns (bytes):
      The derived secret key material.
    
static_privN
static_pub
eph_priv
eph_pub
kdfz
'kdf' is mandatoryr
'%s' must be an ECC keyz
'%s' must be a private ECC keyz('%s' is defined on an incompatible curve)
isinstancer
	TypeErrorZ
has_private
curve)
nameZ
privater
check_curve2
z"key_agreement.<locals>.check_curveT
z'Too few keys for the ECDH key agreement
z"DH mode C(2e, 1s) is not supported)
getr
bool)
kwargsr
count_privZ	count_pubr
key_agreement
Cryptodome.Util.numberr
Cryptodome.PublicKey.ECCr
<module>
